hooks.command: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && cargo fmt -- $TOOL_INPUT_PATH 2>/dev/null; cargo clippy --quiet 2>&1 | grep -E 'error|warning' | head -20
cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python -m black $TOOL_INPUT_PATH --quiet 2>/dev/null; python -m mypy $TOOL_INPUT_PATH --ignore-missing-imports 2>&1 | grep -E 'error|warning' | head -20

cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python -c "import ast, sys; ast.parse(open('$TOOL_INPUT_PATH').read()); print('Syntax OK: $TOOL_INPUT_PATH')" 2>&1; grep -n 'subprocess.run\|subprocess.call\|subprocess.Popen\|os.system\|eval\|exec' $TOOL_INPUT_PATH && echo '⚠️  SECURITY WARNING: Dangerous call detected in Cortex — review before committing' || true

cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && grep -n 'unwrap()\|blocking_send\|spawn_blocking' $TOOL_INPUT_PATH && echo '⚠️  REVIEW: unwrap/blocking_send detected — ensure these are intentional and safe' || echo 'Safety check passed: $TOOL_INPUT_PATH'
echo $TOOL_INPUT | grep -E '\| bash|\| sh|eval |exec |> /dev/|rm -rf|dd if=' && echo 'BLOCKED: Dangerous shell pattern detected' && exit 1 || true
cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) 2>/dev/null && echo '--- VGLF Session End ---' && cargo test --workspace --quiet 2>&1 | tail -5 || true
